steps.title: Use the immediate context
steps.content: The speaker calls summer "a time of pause, a void and silent space between two worlds, when inspiration lags, and feeling sleeps." "A void" is paired with "silent space" and described as a pause where inspiration and feeling are absent — the dominant idea is emptiness.

steps.title: Test the synonym
steps.content: Substitute each choice into "a ____ and silent space between two worlds." The right word should mean "empty/vacant" to match "silent space" and the absence of inspiration and feeling.

steps.title: Eliminate by misread
steps.content:
• Choice A — A useless: the speaker says the pause is for "gathering strength for efforts yet to come," so the interval is purposeful, not useless. ✗
  • Choice B — An empty: "an empty and silent space" matches the pairing exactly — a vacancy where inspiration and feeling are absent. ✓
  • Choice C — A forgotten: nothing in the text says the interval has been overlooked or unremembered; this idea is not in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — An incomplete: the speaker isn't describing something half-finished; the space is a full, defined pause between two worlds. ✗
That is the correct answer.
